data.body: POST-CLOSE (test-quality pass, 813dd5c8): pinned the bounded-retry COUNT behaviorally (recover-early=2 calls; exhaust=exactly 1+OUTPUT_RETRIES) to guard against silent billable-call inflation; added MCP stdio/http happy-path construction; parity edges (length-mismatch ValueError, runner-raises -> errored, min_gold override). All green.
